---
title: "JJM Assessment Documents"
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
---

{{< include _includes/sprfmo-banner.html >}}

```{=html}
<div class="paper-title">JJM Assessment Documents</div>
```

# Overview

This page is the working index for Jack Mackerel Working Group benchmark preparation and MSE planning materials. It links the current workshop notices, benchmark terms of reference, draft SCW16 working papers, preparatory meeting reports, model diagnostics, and supporting assessment resources needed to prepare for the 2026 benchmark and subsequent management-strategy-evaluation work.

The `SCW` prefix follows the SPRFMO Commission convention for sequentially numbered *S*cientific *C*ommittee *W*orkshops; for example, `SCW16` refers to the 16th Scientific Committee Workshop.

## Notices

- **Benchmark workshop information posted:** [Benchmark Workshop Information](Benchmark-workshop-information.html) ([QMD](Benchmark-workshop-information.qmd))
- **Visitor Information posted:** [SPRFMO Jack Mackerel MSE Workshop Visitor Information](SPRFMO-MSE-Workshop-Visitor-Information.html) ([QMD](SPRFMO-MSE-Workshop-Visitor-Information.qmd))

## SCW16 preparations

  - [JMWG 2026 Plan](JMWG-2026-plan.html) ([DOCX](JMWG-2026-plan.docx), [QMD](JMWG-2026-plan.qmd))

  - [SCW16/ToR](JMWG_Benchmark_ToR.html) ([PDF](JMWG_Benchmark_ToR.pdf), [DOCX](JMWG_Benchmark_ToR.docx))

  - [JM SAM Model runs](https://sprfmo.github.io/JM_sam/)

### Draft SCW16 papers

  - [SCW16/Paper-00: Preliminary agenda](SCW16-Paper-00.html) ([PDF](SCW16-Paper-00.pdf), [DOCX](SCW16-Paper-00.docx), [QMD](SCW16-Paper-00.qmd))

  - [SCW16/Paper-01](SCW16-Paper-01.html) ([PDF](SCW16-Paper-01.pdf), [DOCX](SCW16-Paper-01.docx))

  - [SCW16/Paper-03: Meta-Analysis of CPUE Papers on Jack Mackerel (2022-2025)](SCW16-Paper-03-CPUE_MetaAnalysis.html) ([QMD](SCW16-Paper-03-CPUE_MetaAnalysis.qmd))

  - [SCW16/Paper-05/JM_Biology](https://sprfmo.github.io/JM_biol/SCW16-Paper-05-JM_Biology.html) ([PDF](https://sprfmo.github.io/JM_biol/SCW16-Paper-05-JM_Biology.pdf), [DOCX](https://sprfmo.github.io/JM_biol/SCW16-Paper-05-JM_Biology.docx), [QMD](https://github.com/SPRFMO/JM_biol/blob/main/JM_biol.qmd))

  - [SCW16/Paper-06: Toward a standardised abundance index for Chilean jack mackerel: spatio-temporal modelling of acoustic survey data in northern Chile](SCW16-Paper-06-Northern_Chile_Acoustic_STM.pdf) ([PDF](SCW16-Paper-06-Northern_Chile_Acoustic_STM.pdf))

  - [SCW16/Paper-07: Implementation of an informed creep correction into the Chile Jack Mackerel CPUE index](SCW16-Paper-07-Chile_CPUE_Effort_Creep.pdf) ([PDF](SCW16-Paper-07-Chile_CPUE_Effort_Creep.pdf))

  - [SCW16/Paper-08: Interannual variability in distribution, size structure, and biomass of Chilean jack mackerel estimated from fishery-dependent acoustics](SCW16-Paper-08-Fishery_Dependent_Acoustics.pdf) ([PDF](SCW16-Paper-08-Fishery_Dependent_Acoustics.pdf))

  - [SCW16/Paper-09: Jack mackerel acoustic density index in the central-north acoustic surveys, estimated using spatiotemporal models with sdmTMB](SCW16-Paper-09-North_Acoustic_Density_sdmTMB.pdf) ([PDF](SCW16-Paper-09-North_Acoustic_Density_sdmTMB.pdf))

  - [SCW16/Paper-10: Update of Chilean jack mackerel CPUE abundance index estimated by spatiotemporal SPDE-based models using sdmTMB](SCW16-Paper-10-Chile_CPUE_sdmTMB.pdf) ([PDF](SCW16-Paper-10-Chile_CPUE_sdmTMB.pdf))

### Prep meeting reports

- [JMWG Meeting report 01-2026](JMWG-Meeting%20report-01-2026.html) ([PDF](JMWG-Meeting%20report-01-2026.pdf), [DOCX](JMWG-Meeting%20report-01-2026v2.docx))
- [JMWG Meeting report 02-2026](JMWG-Meeting%20report-02-2026.html) ([PDF](JMWG-Meeting%20report-02-2026.pdf), [DOCX](JMWG-Meeting%20report-02-2026.docx))
- [JMWG Meeting report 03-2026](JMWG-Meeting%20report-03-2026.html) ([PDF](JMWG-Meeting%20report-03-2026.pdf), [DOCX](JMWG-Meeting%20report-03-2026.docx))

## Other background reports
- [SC13 Assessment Update](SC13.html)
- [Helper Scripts Guide](helper_scripts_guide.html)
- [User Guide](userguide/)
- [Tutorial Guide](tutorial/)
- [Archive](archive/)

# Document Guide

## SCW16/ToR

These are the benchmark workshop terms of reference, tracked as `JMWG_Benchmark_ToR.qmd`, with published HTML, PDF, and DOCX outputs.

## SCW16/Paper-01

This is the main benchmark working paper, tracked as `SCW16-Paper-01.qmd`, with published HTML, PDF, and DOCX outputs.

## SCW16/Paper-00

This is the preliminary agenda note for the IMARPE-IFOP online acoustic session, tracked as `SCW16-Paper-00.qmd`, with HTML, PDF, and DOCX outputs.

## JMWG Meeting report 01-2026

These meeting notes are currently published from `JMWG-Meeting report-01-2026.qmd` as HTML, PDF, and DOCX outputs.

## JMWG Meeting report 02-2026

These meeting notes are currently published from `JMWG-Meeting report-02-2026.qmd` as HTML, PDF, and DOCX outputs.

## JMWG Meeting report 03-2026

These meeting notes are currently published from `JMWG-Meeting report-03-2026.qmd` as HTML, PDF, and DOCX outputs.

## SCW16/Paper-03: Meta-Analysis of CPUE Papers on Jack Mackerel (2022-2025)

This document compiles CPUE-related SPRFMO meeting papers from SC10 through SC13 into a single review document.

## SCW16/Paper-05/JM_Biology

This external working paper evaluates biological data used in model `1.14`, including natural mortality, maturity, weight-at-age, and spawning biomass calculations. The source is maintained in the `SPRFMO/JM_biol` repository.

## SCW16/Papers-06 through 10: Benchmark abundance-index working papers

These external PDF working papers cover Chilean jack mackerel acoustic and CPUE abundance-index updates prepared for SCW16 benchmark discussions. They are published directly in the `docs/` folder as PDFs.

## SC13 Assessment Update

This is the converted Quarto version of the incremental SC13 assessment update document originally maintained as `assessment/R/SC13.rmd`.

## Helper Scripts Guide

This guide documents the reusable helper scripts added for:

- creating the reduced `2.00` data file
- creating the matching `h1_2.00` control file
- running standard JJM fits
- running short `adnuts` MCMC benchmarks

## User Guide

This is the Quarto version of the JJM user guide converted from `doc/userguide/main.tex`.

## Tutorial Guide

This is the workshop tutorial book published from `doc/tutorial/`.

## Archive

This section collects the legacy annual and validation `RMarkdown` assessment reports moved from `assessment/R/` and published under `archive/`.

# Notes

The website is rendered from the `doc/` directory into the repository `docs/` folder so it can be served by GitHub Pages in the standard way. The underlying model code, inputs, and results remain in `assessment/`.
